author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. All 6 polynomial bases (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Laguerre, Hermite, HermiteE) have with_domain([f64;2]), with_window([f64;2]), and fit_with_domain(x, y, deg) methods, plus a private domain→window affine mapping (auto_domain / map_x / mapparms / validate_domain_window in src/mapping.rs) that's applied in eval. CHEBYSHEV_DEFAULT_DOMAIN/WINDOW etc. are exposed as constants. Each polynomial type stores its domain/window as fields, so a polynomial fitted on [a,b] correctly maps inputs through to the canonical [-1,1] window for evaluation. The infrastructure landed sometime after this issue was filed (2026-03-25); marking as already-resolved.
